title: Add logo and verify/add all PM Surya Ghar process phases content

requirements.text: Regenerate the company logo image to exactly match the uploaded image: a dark navy square background with a gold/amber gradient lightning bolt overlaid on a stylized sun/crescent shape, rendered in a bold illustrative style.
acceptanceCriteria: Logo image matches the uploaded screenshot: dark navy background, gold gradient lightning bolt through a sun/crescent symbol
Logo is displayed in the Header component in the same position as the existing logo
Logo image is saved as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/

requirements.text: Verify that the website includes a dedicated section or slide for Phase 1 – Registration & Feasibility with the following content: (1) Visit the Portal at pmsuryaghar.gov.in, (2) Register by selecting Odisha as State and specific DISCOM (e.g., TP Central Odisha), (3) Enter Electricity Consumer Number and Mobile Number, (4) Submit basic technical details for Feasibility Approval — DISCOM reviews transformer load and approves Feasibility within 7–15 days. If this section is missing or incomplete, add or update it.
acceptanceCriteria: A clearly labelled 'Phase 1 – Registration & Feasibility' section exists on the page
All four sub-steps (Visit Portal, Register, Enter Details, Feasibility Approval with 7–15 day timeline) are displayed
pmsuryaghar.gov.in is referenced as the official portal URL

requirements.text: Verify that the website includes a dedicated section or slide for Phase 2 – Selecting BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION with the following content: (1) Login using Consumer Number, (2) Navigate to 'Select Registered Vendor' section, (3) Filter by State (Odisha) and District, (4) Search for and select BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION, (5) Sign the online agreement (Model Draft) with the vendor to start installation. If this section is missing or incomplete, add or update it.
acceptanceCriteria: A clearly labelled 'Phase 2 – Selecting BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' section exists on the page
All five steps (Login, Vendor List, Filter, Selection, Agreement) are present and accurate
BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION is highlighted as the vendor to select

requirements.text: Verify that the website includes a dedicated section or slide for Phase 3 – Installation & Net-Metering with the following content: (1) Bhagyalaxmi Construction installs solar panels, inverter, and wiring per MNRE standards, (2) Vendor submits completion report with installation details and photos on the portal, (3) Apply for Net-Meter via the portal — DISCOM will visit to install the bi-directional meter. If this section is missing or incomplete, add or update it.
acceptanceCriteria: A clearly labelled 'Phase 3 – Installation & Net-Metering' section exists on the page
All three steps (Installation, Completion Report, Net-Metering application) are displayed
MNRE standards and bi-directional meter are mentioned

requirements.text: Verify that the website includes a dedicated section or slide for Phase 4 – Subsidy Disbursement with the following content: (1) Commissioning Certificate issued by DISCOM after net-meter is functional, (2) Submit bank details by uploading a photo of cancelled cheque, (3) Subsidy of up to ₹1,38,000 is credited directly to bank account within 30 working days. If this section is missing or incomplete, add or update it.
acceptanceCriteria: A clearly labelled 'Phase 4 – Subsidy Disbursement' section exists on the page
All three steps (Commissioning Certificate, Bank Details upload, Payment) are present
Subsidy amount ₹1,38,000 and 30 working days timeline are explicitly mentioned

requirements.text: Verify that the website includes a 'Why Choose Bhagyalaxmi Construction?' section with these three points: (1) Registered Vendor – Officially empaneled in Odisha, (2) Technical Expertise – Ensures high-quality mounting and wiring, (3) Hassle-Free – They assist with technical uploads and documentation required on the portal. If this section is missing or incomplete, add or update it.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Why Choose Bhagyalaxmi Construction?' section is present on the page
All three differentiators (Registered Vendor, Technical Expertise, Hassle-Free) are listed with their descriptions

requirements.text: Verify that the website includes a Contact & Next Steps section displaying: Official Website: pmsuryaghar.gov.in. If this section is missing, add it. Ensure the official portal URL pmsuryaghar.gov.in is clearly visible and clickable.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Contact & Next Steps' section exists on the page
pmsuryaghar.gov.in is displayed as a clickable link
Section encourages users to take next steps

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
The logo image must visually match the uploaded screenshot exactly: dark navy background, gold/amber gradient lightning bolt through a sun/crescent symbol
All portal references must use pmsuryaghar.gov.in as the official URL
nonGoals: Linking to any external portal or third-party registration system
Adding backend data models or persistence for process phase content
Changing the overall site design or color scheme

required: Gold and amber gradient lightning bolt diagonally crossing a cream-colored sun with stylized crescent rays, on a dark navy square background, bold illustrative style (bhagyalaxmi-logo.dim_400x400.png)
